description:
As a Telecommunications Engineer for the Artemis program, verify the Lunar Gateway's communication link availability using the baseline Near Rectilinear Halo Orbit (NRHO) script at ~/Documents/missions/gateway_nrho_baseline.script and DSN specifications from ~/Desktop/dsn_specs.txt. Configure the GMAT simulation to include three GroundStation objects (Goldstone, Madrid, Canberra) with Earth as the CentralBody and a MinimumElevationAngle of 10.0 degrees. Use a ContactLocator targeting the Gateway from these stations with Earth and Moon as OccultingBodies (as the Moon causes blackouts). Save the modified script to ~/Documents/missions/gateway_nrho_dsn.script and the contact report to /home/ga/GMAT_output/Gateway_DSN_Contacts.txt. Calculate the longest continuous communication blackout period (the maximum gap in minutes where no station has visibility) and record the result in ~/GMAT_output/blackout_analysis.txt in the format: Max blackout: <value> minutes.

Login: username=ga, password=password123
